description_long: This is a single-story rectangular bungalow with a flat, muted green roof and matching exterior walls, set on a large grassy plot. The front facade features a small entryway with a glass door and a single window, flanked by a bush. The rear side of the bungalow opens to a covered patio area, furnished with outdoor seating and partially enclosed by a low wall. Three medium-sized trees are distributed around the building, providing shade and a sense of landscaping. The windows are minimal and asymmetrically placed, contributing to a modern, utilitarian appearance. The overall setting suggests a suburban or park-like environment, with the bungalow designed for comfortable, single-family living.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular bungalow with a flat green roof, minimal windows, and a covered rear patio, set on a grassy plot with surrounding trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a glass door, a single window, and a bush near the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated shape of the bungalow, with trees on both sides and the covered patio area partially visible at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio area with outdoor seating and a low wall, as well as a tree nearby.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain side wall with a single window and the arrangement of trees around the bungalow.
